prompt: Find all known kinase inhibitors approved by the FDA that target VEGFR-2. For each, report the drug name, approval year, and whether it also inhibits other kinases (multi-kinase inhibitor).

trajectory.thought: I reviewed the known pharmacological data for FDA-approved small molecule kinase inhibitors targeting VEGFR-2 to extract their approval years and target profiles.
trajectory.raw_response:
PHASE: Conclusion
THOUGHT: I reviewed the known pharmacological data for FDA-approved small molecule kinase inhibitors targeting VEGFR-2 to extract their approval years and target profiles. 
FINAL_CLAIM: The following are known FDA-approved kinase inhibitors that target VEGFR-2. Notably, all approved small-molecule VEGFR-2 inhibitors are multi-kinase inhibitors, as they typically also target other receptor tyrosine kinases (like VEGFR-1, VEGFR-3, PDGFR, or c-Kit).
- Sorafenib (Approved 2005) - Multi-kinase inhibitor
- Sunitinib (Approved 2006) - Multi-kinase inhibitor
- Pazopanib (Approved 2009) - Multi-kinase inhibitor
- Vandetanib (Approved 2011) - Multi-kinase inhibitor
- Axitinib (Approved 2012) - Multi-kinase inhibitor
- Regorafenib (Approved 2012) - Multi-kinase inhibitor
- Cabozantinib (Approved 2012) - Multi-kinase inhibitor
- Lenvatinib (Approved 2015) - Multi-kinase inhibitor
- Tivozanib (Approved 2021) - Multi-kinase inhibitor
- Fruquintinib (Approved 2023) - Multi-kinase inhibitor (highly selective for VEGFR-1, -2, and -3)
CONFIDENCE: 0.95

outcome.final_claim:
The following are known FDA-approved kinase inhibitors that target VEGFR-2. Notably, all approved small-molecule VEGFR-2 inhibitors are multi-kinase inhibitors, as they typically also target other receptor tyrosine kinases (like VEGFR-1, VEGFR-3, PDGFR, or c-Kit).
- Sorafenib (Approved 2005) - Multi-kinase inhibitor
- Sunitinib (Approved 2006) - Multi-kinase inhibitor
- Pazopanib (Approved 2009) - Multi-kinase inhibitor
- Vandetanib (Approved 2011) - Multi-kinase inhibitor
- Axitinib (Approved 2012) - Multi-kinase inhibitor
- Regorafenib (Approved 2012) - Multi-kinase inhibitor
- Cabozantinib (Approved 2012) - Multi-kinase inhibitor
- Lenvatinib (Approved 2015) - Multi-kinase inhibitor
- Tivozanib (Approved 2021) - Multi-kinase inhibitor
- Fruquintinib (Approved 2023) - Multi-kinase inhibitor (highly selective for VEGFR-1, -2, and -3)
